PIERNIK
Z
ORZECHAMI

Piernik is a traditional Polish spiced gingerbread cake, enhanced with the
warmth of roasted walnuts and aromatic spices. This recipe creates a dense,
moist cake perfect for autumn gatherings.

INGREDIENTS:
- 2 cups all-purpose flour
- 1 cup ground walnuts
- 1/2 cup honey
- 1/4 cup melted butter
- 2 eggs
- 1 tsp baking powder
- 1 tsp ground cinnamon
- 1/2 tsp ground cloves
- 1/4 tsp ground nutmeg
- Pinch of salt

INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9-inch round baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine honey and melted butter, then beat in eggs.
3. Mix flour, ground walnuts, baking powder, cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg, and salt.
4. Fold dry ingredients into wet mixture until just combined.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan.
6. Bake 35-40 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean.
7. Cool in pan for 15 minutes, then turn out onto wire rack.

SERVING SUGGESTIONS:
Serve with coffee or tea. Best eaten a day after baking when flavors deepen.
